Question: What is the mean dissolved organic carbon (DOC) concentration across observations from these specific microplots: "Plot 10 — extracted peat relict undergoing vegetative recolonization, north patch" with RedoxMicrotopography = "perennially saturated mat with methanogenic microenvironments suppressed" and PaludificationTrajectory = "restorative trajectory following ditch‑blocking and rewetting intervention"; "Plot 06 — depression hollow with persistent surface water and detrital ooze" with RedoxMicrotopography = "perennially saturated mat with methanogenic microenvironments suppressed" and PaludificationTrajectory = "stable minerotrophic equilibrium under low peat accumulation"; "Plot 02 — ombrotrophic dome with continuous sphagnum carpet, microplot west" with RedoxMicrotopography = "perennially saturated mat with methanogenic microenvironments suppressed" and PaludificationTrajectory = "relict paludification with isolated peat remnants following land conversion"; and "Plot 08 — former drainage canal-adjacent bench, passive rewetting microplot" with RedoxMicrotopography = "oxic ridge with well‑drained bryophyte sward and root‑bound peat" and PaludificationTrajectory = "restorative trajectory following ditch‑blocking and rewetting intervention"?

Question: What is the average carbon uptake rate recorded from the peatland surveys conducted in spring 2023 at the Flow Country in Scotland on the patterned fen with lateral sedge strings at site TR-OD-06 (Okavango fringe 18.30S, 23.25E), combined with measurements taken during the 2021 soil respiration campaign at Loxahatchee NWR in Florida on the lagg margin peatland interface at location TR-LX-08 (Loxahatchee NWR 26.90N, -80.25W), and also from the 2020 baseline restoration study at Kalmthout Heath in Belgium on the same lagg margin interface at TR-OD-06 (Okavango fringe 18.30S, 23.25E)?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(CarbonFluxDensity) AS CarbonFluxDensity FROM (SELECT CarbonFluxDensity AS CarbonFluxDensity FROM PeatlandFluxInventory WHERE MonitoringCampaign = "Spring 2023 eddy-covariance intensive campaign — Flow Country, Scotland" AND HydrogeomorphicClass = "string-flark patterned fen with lateral sedge strings" AND TransectReference = "TR-OD-06 (Okavango fringe 18.30S, 23.25E)" UNION ALL SELECT CarbonFluxDensity AS CarbonFluxDensity FROM PeatlandFluxInventory WHERE MonitoringCampaign = "2021 multi-site ancillary soil respiration campaign — Loxahatchee NWR, Florida" AND HydrogeomorphicClass = "lagg margin peatland interface with lateral seepage" AND TransectReference = "TR-LX-08 (Loxahatchee NWR 26.90N, -80.25W)" UNION ALL SELECT CarbonFluxDensity AS CarbonFluxDensity FROM PeatlandFluxInventory WHERE MonitoringCampaign = "2020 fen restoration baseline survey — Kalmthout Heath, Belgium" AND HydrogeomorphicClass = "lagg margin peatland interface with lateral seepage" AND TransectReference = "TR-OD-06 (Okavango fringe 18.30S, 23.25E)");
